sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Local Government Short title
sections.text:
(Amendment) Act, 2016, and shall be read as one with the Local Cap. 281
Government Act, in this Act referred to as the principal Act.

sections.heading: Section two of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment
Section forty-five A of the principal Act is amended in Amendment
sections.text:
subsection (2) by the insertion, immediately after the word of section
45A
“Councils”, of the words “to pay the salaries of principal officers
and officers of a Council and”.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K4.00 each.
